derivedStats.name: Action Points
derivedStats.description: The amount of actions your character can take during a combat turn.

derivedStats.name: Armor Class
derivedStats.description: How good your character is at avoiding being hit in combat.

derivedStats.name: Carry Weight
derivedStats.description: The maximum amount of equipment your character can carry, in pounds.

derivedStats.name: Critical Chance
derivedStats.description: Chance to cause a critical hit.

derivedStats.name: Damage Resistance
derivedStats.description: Any damage taken is reduced by this amount.

derivedStats.name: Healing Rate
derivedStats.description: How much Hit Points you heal at the end of each day.

derivedStats.name: Hit Points
derivedStats.description: How much damage your character can take before dying.

derivedStats.name: Melee Damage
derivedStats.description: Amount of bonus damage in hand-to-hand combat.

derivedStats.name: Perk Rate
derivedStats.description: How many levels must pass before your character gains another perk.

derivedStats.name: Poison Resistance
derivedStats.description: Reduces any poison damage by this amount.

derivedStats.name: Radiation Resistance
derivedStats.description: Amount of radiation your character is exposed to is reduced by this amount.

derivedStats.name: Sequence
derivedStats.description: Determines how soon in a combat turn your character can react.

derivedStats.name: Skill Rate
derivedStats.description: How many skill points your character gains per level.
